expected_condition: COD model MAT file must exist.
Forbidden leakage columns must not be model inputs.
Balanced test confusion matrix must contain all three classes.
Missed detection rate must be reported.
False alarm rate must be reported.
External imbalanced evaluation must be reported.
Prediction tables must include actual_label and predicted_label.
Warn if balanced-test outage recall is below 0.80.
Warn if balanced-test missed detection rate is above 0.20.
Warn if high accuracy hides poor outage recall.
